name: ss-keel-jwt
description: JWT authentication guard for Keel — token generation, validation, and route protection

steps.description: Secret key used to sign and verify JWT tokens.
Token issuer claim. When empty the generated setup falls back to app.name.
Secret key used to sign and verify JWT tokens — use a long random string in production
Token issuer claim (iss). Defaults to SERVICE_NAME when empty

steps.message:
Next step for JWT projects: protect a route or route group with the generated provider.

protected := app.Group("/api", jwtProvider.Middleware())
httpx.GET("/me", handler).WithSecured("bearerAuth")

Reference: ss-keel-examples/examples/11-jwt-addon
